title: Domino's India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Domino's India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Domino's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Domino's India:
Domino's India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India!
